mule.xsi:schemaLocation: http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/tls http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/tls/current/mule-tls.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/db http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/db/current/mule-db.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce/current/mule-salesforce.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/os http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/os/current/mule-os.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/tls http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/tls/current/mule-tls.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/tracking http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/tracking/current/mule-tracking-ee.xsd

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- payload.CompanyId default ""
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- payload

logger.doc:name: Log Query Variable
logger.message: #[output application/java --- "Get Customer by Customer Id Query: " ++ (vars.query.query default "")]

logger.doc:name: Before Req Logger
logger.message: #[output application/java --- "Before p21 Search Customer Request call" ++ (vars.customerId default "")]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- (vars.companyId default "") as String == (payload[0].CompanyId default "") as String

logger.doc:name: Log Error
logger.message: #[output application/java --- "Error Occurred during Get Customer by Customer Id - " ++ (vars.customerId default "") ++ ". Error is " ++ (error.detailedDescription default error.description)]

logger.doc:name: After Req Logger
logger.message: #[output application/java --- "After p21 Search Customer Request call" ++ (vars.customerId default "")]

logger.doc:name: Company Id Not Match
logger.message: #["The Company ID provided does not match the Company ID associated with the customer record."]

raise-error.doc:name: Raise error- No Company ID Found
raise-error.type: SEARCH CUSTOMER: COMPANY ID NOT PASSED

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- payload.CompanyId ++ "_" ++ payload.CustomerId

logger.doc:name: Before Req Logger
logger.message: #[output application/java --- "Before p21 Search Customers by Customer Id Request call" ++ (vars.customerId default "")]

logger.doc:name: After Req Logger
logger.message: #[output application/java --- "After p21 Search Customers by Customer Id Request call" ++ (vars.customerId default "")]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- payload.CompanyId

logger.doc:name: Company Id Not Match
logger.message: #["The Company ID" ++ (vars.companyId) ++ " does not match the Company ID associated with the customer record."]

logger.doc:name: After Req Logger
logger.message: #[output application/java --- "After p21 Search Customers by Company Id Request call" ++ (payload.CompanyId default "")]

raise-error.doc:name: Raise error- No Company ID Found
raise-error.type: SEARCH CUSTOMER: COMPANY ID NOT PASSED

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- attributes.uriParams.'id'
if (error.errorType.identifier == 'NOT_FOUND') 404 else 500

logger.doc:name: Log Error
logger.message: #[output application/java --- "Error Occurred during Get Contact by Contact Id of contact - " ++ (vars.contactId) ++ " for Customer Id - " ++ (vars.customerId default "") ++ ". Error is " ++ (error.detailedDescription default error.description)]

set-payload.doc:name: Set Payload

logger.doc:name: Log Empty Contact Id Message
logger.message: #[output application/java --- "Contact Id is Empty for Contact No " ++ (vars.counter default "") ++ " of Customer Id " ++ (vars.customerId default "")]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java var SupplierName = attributes.queryParams.SupplierName default "" --- { filter: if(!isEmpty(SupplierName)) ("supplier_name eq'" ++ (SupplierName) ++ "'") else "supplier_name ne null" }
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- { filter: if (attributes.queryParams.companyId != null) attributes.queryParams.companyId else null }

logger.doc:name: Before Req Logger
logger.message: #["Before P21 Product Group Search API call using companyID"]

logger.doc:name: After Req Logger
logger.message: #["After P21 Product Group Search API call using companyID"]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json fun cust(name, value) = { Name: name, Value: (value default "") as String, IgnoreIfEmpty: true } --- { Name: "Customer", Description: null, UseCodeValues: true, IgnoreDisabled: true, Transactions: [ { Status: "New", DataElements: [ { Name: "TABPAGE_1.tp_1_dw_1", BusinessObjectName: null, Type: "Form", Keys: ["company_id", "customer_id"], Rows: [ { Edits: ([ cust("company_id", payload.companyId), cust("customer_id", payload.customerId), cust("customer_name", payload.customerName), cust("mail_address1", payload.mailingAddress.address1), cust("mail_address2", payload.mailingAddress.address2), cust("mail_city", payload.mailingAddress.city), cust("mail_state", payload.mailingAddress.state), cust("mail_postal_code", payload.mailingAddress.postalCode), cust("customer_cod_payloaduired_flag", payload.customerCodpayloaduiredFlag ), cust("mail_country", payload.mailingAddress.country), cust("customer_fob_payloaduired_flag", payload.customerFobpayloaduiredFlag ), cust("salesrep_id", (payload.customerSalesReps[0].salesrepId default payload.salesrepId)), cust("customer_type_cd", payload.customerTypeCd ), cust("lead_source_id", payload.leadSourceId ), cust("wee_taxable_flag", payload.weeTaxableFlag ), cust("wee_collected_account_no", payload.weeCollectedAccountNo ), cust("corp_address_id", payload.corpAddressId ), cust("billing_address_id", payload.billingAddressId ), cust("terms_id", payload.termsId ), cust("service_terms_id", payload.serviceTermsId), cust("shipping_address", payload.shippingAddress), cust("delete_flag", payload.deleteFlag), cust("currency_id", payload.currencyId), cust("date_acct_opened", payload.dateAcctOpened), cust("consolidated_ship_to_id", payload.consolidatedShipToId), cust("parker_customer_cd", payload.parkerCustomerCd), cust("web_enabled_flag", payload.webEnabledFlag), cust("pedigree_customer", payload.pedigreeCustomer), cust("last_hard_touch_date", payload.lastHardTouchDate), cust("national_flag", payload.nationalFlag), cust("legal_name", payload.legalName), cust("ufc_customer_ud_salesforce_id", payload.ufcCustomerUdSalesforceId), cust("ufc_customer_ud_charge_handling", payload.ufcCustomerUdChargeHandling), cust("ufc_customer_ud_sf_account_id", payload.ufcCustomerUdSfAccountId), cust("ufc_customer_ud_sf_last_sync", payload.ufcCustomerUdSfLastSync), cust("salesrep_name", payload.salesrepName), cust("company_name", payload.companyName), cust("source_description", payload.sourceDescription), cust("ufc_customer_legacy_id", payload.ufcCustomerLegacyId) ]), RelativeDateEdits: [] } ] }, { Name: "TABPAGE_5.tp_5_dw_5", BusinessObjectName: null, Type: "Form", Keys: [], Rows: [ { Edits: ([ cust("phys_address1", payload.physicalAddress.address1), cust("phys_address2", payload.physicalAddress.address2), cust("phys_city", payload.physicalAddress.city), cust("phys_state", payload.physicalAddress.state), cust("phys_postal_code", payload.physicalAddress.postalCode), cust("phys_country", payload.physicalAddress.country), cust("central_phone_number", payload.physicalAddress.phone), cust("central_fax_number", payload.physicalAddress.fax), cust("central_watts_number", payload.physicalAddress.watts), cust("email_address", payload.physicalAddress.email), cust("url", payload.physicalAddress.url) ]), RelativeDateEdits: [] } ] }, { Name: "SHIP_TO_GENERAL.ship_to_general", BusinessObjectName: null, Type: "Form", Keys: [], Rows: [ { Edits: ([ cust("default_branch", payload.shipToGeneral.defaultBranch), cust("freight_cd", payload.shipToGeneral.freightCd), cust("packing_basis", payload.shipToGeneral.packingBasis) ]), RelativeDateEdits: [] } ] }, { Name: "TABPAGE_7.tp_7_dw_price_library", BusinessObjectName: null, Type: "List", Keys: ["price_library_id"], Rows: (payload.priceLibraries default []) map (pl) -> { Edits: ([ cust("price_library_id", pl.priceLibraryId), cust("sequence_number", pl.sequenceNumber), cust("row_status_flag", pl.rowStatusFlag), cust("description", pl.description) ]), RelativeDateEdits: [] } }, { Name: "LINKS.links", BusinessObjectName: null, Type: "List", Keys: ["contact_id", "contact_type_cd"], Rows: (payload.contacts default []) map (l) -> { Edits: ([ cust("contact_id", l.contactId), cust("contact_type_cd", l.contactTypeCd), cust("email_address", l.email), cust("statement_contact", l.statementContact), cust("row_status_flag", l.rowStatusFlag), cust("pedigree_contact", l.pedigreeContact), cust("contact_link_name", l.contactLinkName), cust("title", l.title), cust("direct_phone", l.directPhone), cust("phone_ext", l.phoneExt), cust("direct_fax", l.directFax), cust("fax_ext", l.faxExt), cust("last_hard_touch_date", l.lastHardTouchDate), cust("contacts_delete_flag", l.contactsDeleteFlag), cust("cf_spaces", l.cfSpaces), cust("cf_contact_name", l.cfContactName) ]), RelativeDateEdits: [] } }, { Name: "SHIP_TOS.ship_tos", BusinessObjectName: null, Type: "List", Keys: ["ship_to_id"], Rows: (payload.shipTos default []) map (st) -> { Edits: ([ cust("ship_to_id", st.shipToId), cust("name", st.name), cust("last_hard_touch_date", st.lastHardTouchDate), cust("ufc_address_phys_address1", st.address1), cust("ufc_address_phys_address2", st.address2), cust("ufc_address_phys_city", st.city), cust("ufc_address_phys_state", st.state), cust("ufc_address_phys_postal_code", st.postalCode) ]), RelativeDateEdits: [] } }, { Name: "CUSTOMERSALESREP.customersalesrep", BusinessObjectName: null, Type: "List", Keys: ["salesrep_id"], Rows: (payload.customerSalesReps default []) map (si) -> { Edits: ([ cust("salesrep_id", si.salesrepId), cust("salesrep_name", si.salesrepName), cust("commission_percentage", si.commissionPercentage), cust("primary_salesrep_flag", si.primaryFlag), cust("row_status_flag", si.rowStatusFlag), cust("compute_1", si.compute1) ]), RelativeDateEdits: [] } } ], Documents: null } ] }

http:request.doc:name: Customers Search By Contact Details Request call

logger.doc:name: Before Req Logger
logger.message: #["Before P21 Item Search API call using Item ID"]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java var inputId = attributes.queryParams.itemId default "" --- (inputId default "") replace /^(#)/ with "%23"
error.exception.errorMessage.attributes.statusCode default 500

logger.doc:name: After Req Logger
logger.message: #["After P21 Item Search API call using Item ID"]

logger.doc:name: Before Req Logger
logger.message: #["Before P21 Inventory Search API call using Item Part ID"]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- attributes.queryParams.partSearch

%dw 2.0 output application/java var partNum = attributes.queryParams.partSearch default "" fun normalizeInput(s) = (s default "") replace /[- _'"]/ with "" --- { "filter": "contains(SuppPartNorm,'" ++ normalizeInput(partNum) ++ "') or supplier_part_no eq '" ++ partNum ++ "' or contains(ItemNorm,'" ++ normalizeInput(partNum) ++ "') or item_id eq '" ++ partNum ++ "'" }

logger.doc:name: After Req Logger
logger.message: #["After P21 Inventory Search API call using Item Part ID"]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "status": "Success", "results": ({"@odata.context": payload.'@odata.context', value: payload.value map ((item, index) -> item -- ['ItemNorm','SuppPartNorm']) }), "correlationId": vars.correlationId }

logger.doc:name: Before Req Logger
logger.message: #["Before P21 Updating Customer with Contact ID API call"]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- attributes.queryParams.companyId ++ "_" ++ attributes.queryParams.customerId

%dw 2.0 output application/xml ns xsi http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance ns xsd http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema
var c = payload
fun nilOrValue(fieldName: String, value) = if ( value == null or (value is Boolean and value == true) or (value == "true") or (value is String and isEmpty(trim(value))) ) { (fieldName) @("xsi:nil": "true"): null } else { (fieldName): value } --- { Customer @( "xmlns:xsd": "http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema", "xmlns:xsi": "http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" ): {
CustomerAddress: { CorpAddressId: c.CustomerAddress.CorpAddressId, MailAddress1: (c.CustomerAddress default {}).MailAddress1, MailAddress2: (c.CustomerAddress default {}).MailAddress2, MailAddress3: (c.CustomerAddress default {}).MailAddress3, MailCity: (c.CustomerAddress default {}).MailCity, MailState: (c.CustomerAddress default {}).MailState, MailPostalCode: (c.CustomerAddress default {}).MailPostalCode, MailCountry: (c.CustomerAddress default {}).MailCountry, CentralPhoneNumber: (c.CustomerAddress default {}).CentralPhoneNumber, CentralFaxNumber: (c.CustomerAddress default {}).CentralFaxNumber, Alternative1099Name: (c.CustomerAddress default {}).Alternative1099Name, NameControl: (c.CustomerAddress default {}).NameControl, PhysAddress1: (c.CustomerAddress default {}).PhysAddress1, PhysAddress2: (c.CustomerAddress default {}).PhysAddress2, PhysAddress3: (c.CustomerAddress default {}).PhysAddress3, PhysCity: (c.CustomerAddress default {}).PhysCity, PhysState: (c.CustomerAddress default {}).PhysState, PhysPostalCode: (c.CustomerAddress default {}).PhysPostalCode, PhysCountry: (c.CustomerAddress default {}).PhysCountry, Incorporated: (c.CustomerAddress default {}).Incorporated, EmailAddress: (c.CustomerAddress default {}).EmailAddress, Url: (c.CustomerAddress default {}).Url, AddressId: (c.CustomerAddress default {}).AddressId, Name: (c.CustomerAddress default {}).Name, PhysCounty: (c.CustomerAddress default {}).PhysCounty, UserDefinedFields: (c.CustomerAddress default {}).UserDefinedFields default {} },
CustomerEDITransactions: c.CustomerEDITransactions default {},
CustomerSalesreps: { CustomerSalesrep: (c.CustomerSalesreps.CustomerSalesrep default []) map (sr) -> { SalesrepId: sr.SalesrepId, PrimarySalesrep: sr.PrimarySalesrep, CommissionPercentage: sr.CommissionPercentage, Status: sr.Status, CompanyId: sr.CompanyId, CustomerId: sr.CustomerId, CustomerSalesrepUid: sr.CustomerSalesrepUid, UserDefinedFields: sr.UserDefinedFields default {} } }, CustomerDealerTypes: c.CustomerDealerTypes default {}, CustomerContacts: { OEContactsCustomer: (c.CustomerContacts.OEContactsCustomer default []) map (ct) -> { CompanyId: ct.CompanyId, CustomerId: ct.CustomerId, ContactId: ct.ContactId, Delete: ct.Delete, UserDefinedFields: ct.UserDefinedFields default {} } },
CustomerShipTos: { ShipTo: (c.CustomerShipTos.ShipTo default []) map (s) -> { ShipToAddress: { CorpAddressId: (s.ShipToAddress default {}).CorpAddressId, MailAddress1: (s.ShipToAddress default {}).MailAddress1, MailAddress2: (s.ShipToAddress default {}).MailAddress2, MailAddress3: (s.ShipToAddress default {}).MailAddress3, MailCity: (s.ShipToAddress default {}).MailCity, MailState: (s.ShipToAddress default {}).MailState, MailPostalCode: (s.ShipToAddress default {}).MailPostalCode, MailCountry: (s.ShipToAddress default {}).MailCountry, CentralPhoneNumber: (s.ShipToAddress default {}).CentralPhoneNumber, CentralFaxNumber: (s.ShipToAddress default {}).CentralFaxNumber, Alternative1099Name: (s.ShipToAddress default {}).Alternative1099Name, NameControl: (s.ShipToAddress default {}).NameControl, PhysAddress1: (s.ShipToAddress default {}).PhysAddress1, PhysAddress2: (s.ShipToAddress default {}).PhysAddress2, PhysAddress3: (s.ShipToAddress default {}).PhysAddress3, PhysCity: (s.ShipToAddress default {}).PhysCity, PhysState: (s.ShipToAddress default {}).PhysState, PhysPostalCode: (s.ShipToAddress default {}).PhysPostalCode, PhysCountry: (s.ShipToAddress default {}).PhysCountry, Incorporated: (s.ShipToAddress default {}).Incorporated, EmailAddress: (s.ShipToAddress default {}).EmailAddress, Url: (s.ShipToAddress default {}).Url, AddressId: (s.ShipToAddress default {}).AddressId, Name: (s.ShipToAddress default {}).Name, PhysCounty: (s.ShipToAddress default {}).PhysCounty, UserDefinedFields: (s.ShipToAddress default {}).UserDefinedFields default {} },
CompanyId: s.CompanyId, ShipToName: s.ShipToName, CustomerId: s.CustomerId, DefaultBranch: s.DefaultBranch, TaxGroupId: s.TaxGroupId, TermsId: s.TermsId, InvoiceType: s.InvoiceType, StateExemptionNumber: s.StateExemptionNumber, StateExciseTaxExemptionNo: s.StateExciseTaxExemptionNo, FederalExemptionNumber: s.FederalExemptionNumber, OtherExemptionNumber: s.OtherExemptionNumber, DefaultSourceLocationId: s.DefaultSourceLocationId, PackingBasis: s.PackingBasis, PickTicketType: s.PickTicketType, (nilOrValue("DefaultCarrierId", s.DefaultCarrierId)), DeliveryInstructions: s.DeliveryInstructions, RouteCode: s.RouteCode, AcceptPartialOrders: s.AcceptPartialOrders, HandlingCharge: s.HandlingCharge, Class1Id: s.Class1Id, Class2Id: s.Class2Id, Class3Id: s.Class3Id, Class4Id: s.Class4Id, Class5Id: s.Class5Id, FreightCd: s.FreightCd, ExcludeCanceldFromPickTix: s.ExcludeCanceldFromPickTix, ExcludeCanceldFromPackList: s.ExcludeCanceldFromPackList, PrintPricesOnPackinglist: s.PrintPricesOnPackinglist, PrintPackinglistInShipping: s.PrintPackinglistInShipping, ServiceTermsId: s.ServiceTermsId, OrderPriorityId: s.OrderPriorityId, FreightChargeId: s.FreightChargeId, UseCustomerUPSHandlingCharge: s.UseCustomerUPSHandlingCharge, UpsHandlingCharge: s.UpsHandlingCharge, UpsThirdPartyBillingNo: s.UpsThirdPartyBillingNo, IncludeNonAllocOnPickTix: s.IncludeNonAllocOnPickTix, IncludeNonAllocOnPackList: s.IncludeNonAllocOnPackList, ShipToId: s.ShipToId, Delete: s.Delete, DefaultShipTime @("xsi:nil": "true"): null, MorningBegDelivery @("xsi:nil": "true"): null, MorningEndDelivery @("xsi:nil": "true"): null, EveningBegDelivery @("xsi:nil": "true"): null, EveningEndDelivery @("xsi:nil": "true"): null, ThirdPartyBillingFlag: s.ThirdPartyBillingFlag, SendOutsideUseDocs: s.SendOutsideUseDocs, SendOutsideUsePrint: s.SendOutsideUsePrint, SendOutsideUseFax: s.SendOutsideUseFax, SendOutsideUseEmail: s.SendOutsideUseEmail, SalesrepId: s.SalesrepId, UserDefinedFields: s.UserDefinedFields default {} } }, CustomerPriceLibraries: { CustomerPriceLibrary: (c.CustomerPriceLibraries.CustomerPriceLibrary default []) map (pl) -> { PriceLibraryId: pl.PriceLibraryId, SequenceNumber: pl.SequenceNumber, RowStatus: pl.RowStatus, Uid: pl.Uid, UserDefinedFields: pl.UserDefinedFields default {} } }, CompanyId: c.CompanyId, CustomerId: c.CustomerId, CustomerName: c.CustomerName, SalesrepId: c.SalesrepId, TermsId: c.TermsId, CodRequiredFlag: c.CodRequiredFlag, GenerateFinanceCharges: c.GenerateFinanceCharges, FcCycle: c.FcCycle, MinimumFinanceCharge: c.MinimumFinanceCharge, FinanceChargeShipToId @("xsi:nil": "true"): null, FcGraceDays: c.FcGraceDays, FcPercentage: c.FcPercentage, LastFcDate @("xsi:nil": "true"): null, CreditStatus: c.CreditStatus, CreditLimit: c.CreditLimit, CreditLimitPerOrder: c.CreditLimitPerOrder, CreditLimitCheckAtShipment: c.CreditLimitCheckAtShipment, OverrideRevenueByItem: c.OverrideRevenueByItem, OrderAcknowledgments: c.OrderAcknowledgments, PoNoRequired: c.PoNoRequired, LimitMaxShipmentsPerOrder: c.LimitMaxShipmentsPerOrder, MinimumOrderDollarAmount: c.MinimumOrderDollarAmount, PickTicketType: c.PickTicketType, DefaultDisposition: c.DefaultDisposition, BillToContactId: c.BillToContactId, InvoicePrintQty: c.InvoicePrintQty, GenerateCustomerStatements: c.GenerateCustomerStatements, Taxable: c.Taxable, StatementBalance: c.StatementBalance, SicCode @("xsi:nil": "true"): null, Class1id: c.Class1id, Class2id: c.Class2id, Class3id: c.Class3id, Class4id: c.Class4id, Class5id: c.Class5id, StateSalesTaxExemptionNo: c.StateSalesTaxExemptionNo, StateExciseTaxExemptionNo: c.StateExciseTaxExemptionNo, FederalExemptionNumber: c.FederalExemptionNumber, OtherExemptionNumber: c.OtherExemptionNumber, SecurityInfo: c.SecurityInfo, InterchgReceiverId: c.InterchgReceiverId, InternationalSAN: c.InternationalSAN, TradingPartnerName: c.TradingPartnerName, PrintPricesOnPackinglist: c.PrintPricesOnPackinglist, InvoiceBatchNumber: c.InvoiceBatchNumber, StatementBatchNumber: c.StatementBatchNumber, JobPricing: c.JobPricing, DefaultRebateLocationId @("xsi:nil": "true"): null, CurrencyId: c.CurrencyId, OverrideProfitLimit: c.OverrideProfitLimit, MinimumOrderLineProfit @("xsi:nil": "true"): null, MaximumOrderLineProfit @("xsi:nil": "true"): null, MinimumOrderProfit @("xsi:nil": "true"): null, MaximumOrderProfit @("xsi:nil": "true"): null, (nilOrValue("DateAcctOpened", c.DateAcctOpened)), PrintPackinglistInShipping: c.PrintPackinglistInShipping, InclNonAllocOnTixText: c.InclNonAllocOnTixText, ExcludeCanceldFromPickTix: c.ExcludeCanceldFromPickTix, InclNonAllocOnListText: c.InclNonAllocOnListText, ExcludeCanceldFromPackList: c.ExcludeCanceldFromPackList, AlwaysUseJobPrice: c.AlwaysUseJobPrice, AllowNonJobItem: c.AllowNonJobItem, PromptForNonJobItem: c.PromptForNonJobItem, AllowExceedJobQty: c.AllowExceedJobQty, PrintLotAttribOnInvoice: c.PrintLotAttribOnInvoice, PrintLotAttribOnPacklist: c.PrintLotAttribOnPacklist, OverTolerancePercentage @("xsi:nil": "true"): null, UnderTolerancePercentage @("xsi:nil": "true"): null, CustomerType: c.CustomerType, LeadSourceId: c.LeadSourceId, UseAllContracts: c.UseAllContracts, JobNumberRequired: c.JobNumberRequired, (nilOrValue("PromiseDateBuffer", c.PromiseDateBuffer)), FreightChargeId: c.FreightChargeId, OrderPriorityId: c.OrderPriorityId, UseSystemUPSHandlingCharge: c.UseSystemUPSHandlingCharge, UpsHandlingCharge: c.UpsHandlingCharge, DaysOverdueForCreditHold @("xsi:nil": "true"): null, Delete: c.Delete, SendOutsideUseDocs: c.SendOutsideUseDocs, SendOutsideUsePrint: c.SendOutsideUsePrint, SendOutsideUseFax: c.SendOutsideUseFax, SendOutsideUseEmail: c.SendOutsideUseEmail, LegacyId: c.LegacyId, PricingMethod: c.PricingMethod, RequirePaymentUponReleaseOfItems: c.RequirePaymentUponReleaseOfItems, CreditLimitUsed: c.CreditLimitUsed, CreditLimitAvailable: c.CreditLimitAvailable, CorporateCreditLimit: c.CorporateCreditLimit, CorporateCreditLimitAvailable: c.CorporateCreditLimitAvailable, WebEnabledFlag: c.WebEnabledFlag, UserDefinedFields: c.UserDefinedFields default {} } }

logger.doc:name: After Req Logger
logger.message: #["After P21 Updating Customer with Contact ID API call"]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- attributes.queryParams.CustomerId

logger.doc:name: Before Req Logger
logger.message: #["Before P21 Customer Shop To API call"]

logger.doc:name: After Req Logger
logger.message: #["After P21 Customer Ship To API call"]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- { filter: if (attributes.queryParams.companyId != null) "company_id eq '" ++ attributes.queryParams.companyId ++ "'" else null }

logger.doc:name: Before Req Logger
logger.message: #["Before P21 Location Search API call using companyID"]

logger.doc:name: After Req Logger
logger.message: #["After P21 Location Search API call using companyID"]

logger.doc:name: Response Logger
logger.message: #["Completed retrieving Location information by Company Id"]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- { filter: if (attributes.queryParams.companyId != null) "company_id eq '" ++ attributes.queryParams.companyId ++ "'" else null }

logger.doc:name: Before Req Logger
logger.message: #["Before P21 List of Users Search API call using companyID"]

logger.doc:name: After Req Logger
logger.message: #["After P21 List of Users Search API call using companyID"]

logger.doc:name: Response Logger
logger.message: #["Completed retrieving List of Users by Company Id"]
